description: Use X/Twitter with local searchable archives, post and conversation resolvers, collections, analytics, MCP tools, and tier diagnostics.

auth_env_var_specs.name: X_BEARER_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: App-only Bearer token for public reads (tweet/user lookup, recent search, lists, spaces). Required minimum - nothing works without it. Get one at https://console.x.com/ (app, then Keys and Tokens, then Bearer Token).

auth_env_var_specs.name: X_OAUTH2_USER_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Optional OAuth2 user-context token. Unlocks v2 writes (post, like, repost, bookmark, follow, DM) and personal reads (me, mentions, home timeline, bookmarks). Sent as Authorization Bearer; obtain from an OAuth2 authorization-code + PKCE flow and set/import explicitly. auth login --chrome is cookie-only for X Articles.

novel_features.name: Post URL resolver
novel_features.description: Normalize any X post URL or raw post ID into a canonical structured post record with provenance, author context, metrics, local-state reuse, and suggested next workflow commands.

novel_features.name: Conversation context resolver
novel_features.description: Resolve a post URL or ID, include parent and quote context when available, and optionally pull bounded replies from local store or recent search.

novel_features.name: Durable post collections
novel_features.description: Save resolved X posts into local named collections, list saved source material, and export it as markdown, JSON, JSONL, or CSV.

novel_features.name: Watermarked X monitors
novel_features.description: Create named query, URL, or account monitors, run them with local watermarks and dedupe, and reuse saved results for later briefing.

novel_features.name: Source-backed X briefs
novel_features.description: Package monitor results, collections, or explicit posts into deterministic JSON or markdown briefs with source links and metrics.

novel_features.name: Account snapshots
novel_features.description: Capture profile basics, public metrics, pinned post, and recent posts for an account by username or user ID.

novel_features.name: URL mention tracking
novel_features.description: Find recent posts mentioning a URL, domain, repo, article, or product page and optionally save them into a collection or monitor.

novel_features.name: Post performance tracking
novel_features.description: Store timestamped post metrics locally, backfill recent account posts when auth allows, and analyze saved snapshots by useful dimensions.

novel_features.name: Timeline export
novel_features.description: Export an account or query timeline as markdown, JSON, or JSONL for research, notes, archives, or downstream analysis.

novel_features.name: Offline thread reconstruction
novel_features.description: Rebuild a full conversation thread from your locally synced posts — ordered and depth-tagged — without re-spending API read credits.

novel_features.name: Markdown to tweet thread
novel_features.description: Split a markdown file into a numbered, 280-char-packed self-reply thread; prints by default and only posts with --post.

novel_features.name: Markdown to X Article
novel_features.description: Parse a markdown file with YAML frontmatter into the Draft.js content_state JSON X's Articles editor accepts; previews by default; --draft saves a draft, --post publishes publicly.

novel_features.name: Offline bookmark search
novel_features.description: Search your synced bookmarks by keyword and/or author, offline — X has no bookmark search and its API exposes no bookmark timestamp, so the local store rebuilds the missing retrieval layer without re-spending read credits.

novel_features.name: Top posts ranking
novel_features.description: Compose /2/users/me with the user-timeline read into one ranked leaderboard of your recent posts by engagement (likes + reposts + replies + quotes), or by a single metric via --metric. Paginates the timeline up to --max-fetch, ranks client-side, and degrades gracefully when impression_count is unavailable below Basic tier. Read-only.

catalog_description: Use X/Twitter with local searchable archives, post and conversation resolvers, collections, analytics, MCP tools, and tier diagnostics.
